reviews.comment:
Es la única estación que hay. No hay otra a la redonda. A la noche se forma fila para gas y combustibles y hay una sola persona que atiende a todos, podrían en ese horario poner a alguien más

(Translated by Google)
It's the only gas station around. There aren't any others nearby. At night, there's a line for gas and fuel, and there's only one person serving everyone. They could at least hire someone else during those hours.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ1X1BtdnRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Te atienden con mucha amabilidad y predisposición para usar la app YPF, ya que la señal 4G es inestable en  la villa cabecera

(Translated by Google)
They serve you with great kindness and willingness to use the YPF app, since the 4G signal is unstable in the main town.

reviews.comment:
Atencion impecable.
Baños muy limpios aunque un poco descuidados en infraestructura.  Cuentan con servicompras y servicios Aca

(Translated by Google)
Impeccable service.
Bathrooms very clean, although the infrastructure is a bit neglected. They have convenience stores and other services.

reviews.comment:
Muy considerados, si te detienes en la noche bajo las luces para estacionar un rato, los muy buenas personas, apagan todo y te dejan a oscuras. Y si, cargue nafta, no estuve de a gratis pero aun asi apagaron todo

(Translated by Google)
Very considerate. If you stop at night under your lights to park for a while, these very kind people turn everything off and leave you in the dark. And yes, I filled up with gas; it wasn't free, but they still turned everything off.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ5eWItd3VBRRAB

Excellent service and cleanliness. The staff was very friendly, congratulations!

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de la chica que está en el serví compras donde merendamos y nos preparó unos café exquisito muy amable y súper predispuesta en la atención!!! Y preparar un capuchino y licuado de frutilla y todo se veía muy bueno, lugar ideal no solo para cargar combustible ya que hay pocas estaciones de servicio por la zona y de paso parar por un café en el horario que sea EXCELENTE

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the girl at the convenience store where we had a snack. She made us delicious coffee, was very kind and helpful! She also made a cappuccino and a strawberry smoothie, and everything looked great. It's an ideal place not only to fill up with gas, since there are few gas stations in the area, but also to stop for a coffee at any time. EXCELLENT!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ5akpiekFnEAE
